title: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Foster Families - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Foster Families 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Foster Families Foster Families Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER NAYA GENERATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an intergenerational, cooperative community designed to support families of foster children by promoting permanency, community, and caring relationships, while offering safety and meaningful purpose in the daily lives of older adults. Rental agreement includes 100 hours per quarter of volunteer service to the community. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: -Preference for age 55 and older who have children residing with them, parents of children in foster care who are reuniting with their families, and foster families -Households earning up to 60% of the area’s median income (AMI) Hours: Phone: Monday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm, Tuesday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (503) 719-6751 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER NAYA GENERATIONS
